_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values. Never commit config.json to git.

notion._comment_page_id: Should be in this format xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx (32 hex chars with dashes). You can find this in the URL of your Notion page.

interests._comment_topics: List the topics you care about. The agent uses these to filter posts.
interests._comment_engagement: Optional: describe posts/discussions you've previously engaged with so Claude can learn your style. Update this over time.
interests.engagement_signal: I tend to engage most with posts that connect theory to real business cases, especially in tech or emerging markets. I like discussions that spark debate rather than just share facts.
